notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis reaches on a fielder's choice. Josh Bell scores. Ryan Jeffers to 3rd. Trevor Larnach to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Carson Williams.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Twins challenged (shift violation), call on the field was overturned: Ryan Jeffers reaches on a defensive shift violation error by second baseman Ben Williamson.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca grounds out, second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luke Keaschall reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.
